name: argyreia nervosa
mechanism: used in ayurvedic and polynesian traditions for mind-opening
interactions: May potentiate: Serotonin syndrome risk with other psychoactives
safetyNotes: Potentially toxic; avoid unsupervised use; Avoid with antidepressants; Avoid with antipsychotics.
